title: End-to-end user journey through feedback submission, general app settings (licenses and privacy policy), and notifications configuration
feature: Poly Studio App - Main Menu & Settings
scenario: User navigates feedback submission, general settings (licenses, privacy policy), and notification toggles as a guest with no device connected.
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio app on your mobile device (Android/iOS).
2. Complete onboarding as a guest with no device connected.
4. Access the feedback page from the main menu.
5. Navigate to the General Settings section.
6. Verify the following sections are present under General Settings: Account, About, Notifications and Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, Licenses.
7. Open the Licenses section and view the third-party software licenses.
8. Open the Privacy Policy section and view the privacy policy.
9. Navigate to the Notifications and Device Alerts section.
10. Configure the following notification toggles: Notifications, Device Charging, Device Disconnected, Low Battery, Device Software Update.
expected: User can successfully navigate through the feedback submission, general settings (licenses and privacy policy), and notifications configuration without errors.
